reason: This is a common Islamic prayer asking for blessings on Prophet Muhammad, with no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: اللّهم صلّ وسلَمٌ علىَ نبَينا محّمد ﷺ اللّهم صلّ وسلَمٌ علىَ نبَينا محّمد ﷺ اللّهم صلّ وسلَمٌ علىَ نبَينا محّمد ﷺ”
